title: Codeforces 3500+ Problems
description: A deliberately small archive of very hard Codeforces problems, each published only after the reasoning and implementation are strong enough to stand as portfolio work.
statementPolicy: Each page keeps an original summary and links to the official Codeforces statement instead of mirroring it.

startHere.label: Start with the algebraic side
startHere.description: The first batch opens with a linear-basis problem where the main challenge is deriving the correct counting model, not just writing the code.
